svg.title: Impact versus effort quadrant for Larder feature clusters
svg.desc: A scatter placing the merged feature clusters by impact and effort. The Larder Loop, Cook Mode and Substitutions sit high-impact; cheap table-stakes cluster low-left; Fridge-photo AI, Creator pillar and Mentor sit as high-effort big bets; Smart kitchen and Planner are deferred.
svg.text: dashed ring = wild card to protect from the cut
